docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KIMBERLY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, L.P A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS STREET #301, SAN FRANCISCO , SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78289067)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF UD-120 (TRANSACTION ID # 78210233) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, L.P A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78326471)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, L.P A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78210233), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, L.P A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED DEC-13-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KIMBERLY
